pitch_global: Put Mickael in his cozy apartment, browsing through travel websites. This person is hesitating but finally clicks 'book' for an overwater villa in the Maldives. Transition to Mickael arriving at the Maldives, stepping off a boat onto the wooden deck of his villa. This person is taking a deep breath, eyes wide with awe. Put Mickael on the deck, watching the sunset over the ocean. This person is smiling, feeling the gentle breeze. Move to Mickael snorkeling in the clear waters, surrounded by colorful fish. This person is laughing, feeling a sense of freedom. Finally, put Mickael relaxing on a hammock, sipping a tropical drink. This person is at peace, embracing the moment.

imaginaire_collectif.imaginaire: The quintessential vision of a Maldivian dream features an overwater villa perched above crystal-clear turquoise waters. The villa's wooden deck extends over the sea, offering a breathtaking view of the endless horizon. Below, vibrant coral reefs teem with colorful fish. The sky is a perfect blue, dotted with fluffy white clouds, and as the sun sets, the scene is bathed in hues of orange and pink.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael sits in his cozy apartment, browsing travel websites. He hesitates, but finally clicks 'book' for an overwater villa in the Maldives, leaning back with a satisfied smile.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Sitting upright, focused on the laptop screen, then leaning back with a smile.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From sitting at the desk to leaning back in the chair.
pitchs_attitudes.interaction_continue: Looking at the screen with a thoughtful expression, then nodding to himself.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael arrives at the Maldives, stepping off a boat onto the wooden deck of his villa. He takes a deep breath, eyes wide with awe as he absorbs the stunning view.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Standing tall, holding a small travel bag, eyes wide with wonder.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From stepping off the boat to standing on the deck facing the ocean.
pitchs_attitudes.interaction_continue: Looking around with wide eyes, taking in the surroundings.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: On the deck, Mickael watches the sunset over the ocean. He smiles serenely, feeling the gentle breeze as he leans back in a deck chair.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Standing with hands on the railing, then sitting back in a deck chair, relaxed.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From standing at the railing to sitting in the deck chair.
pitchs_attitudes.interaction_continue: Watching the sunset with a serene smile, enjoying the moment.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Mickael snorkels in the clear waters, surrounded by colorful fish. He laughs with joy, feeling a sense of freedom as he swims among the coral reefs.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Floating calmly, then swimming energetically with laughter.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From floating near the villa to swimming among coral reefs.
pitchs_attitudes.interaction_continue: Observing fish with interest, reaching out to touch the water playfully.

pitchs_attitudes.pitch: Relaxing in a hammock on the deck, Mickael sips a tropical drink. He closes his eyes, embracing the peace and tranquility of the moment.
pitchs_attitudes.attitude_protagoniste: Lying comfortably in the hammock, hands resting on the stomach.
pitchs_attitudes.deplacement: From sipping a drink to relaxing with eyes closed.
pitchs_attitudes.interaction_continue: Looking up at the sky with a smile, then embracing the moment with a content expression.

cadrages.justification_plan: Permet de voir l'interaction de Mickael avec son ordinateur tout en capturant l'ambiance de l'appartement.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Renforce l'intimité et la transition de l'hésitation à la décision.
cadrages.justification_angle: Identification du spectateur avec Mickael, partageant son moment de décision.

cadrages.justification_plan: Capture l'immensité et la beauté du lieu, accentuant le sentiment d'émerveillement de Mickael.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Révèle progressivement le cadre idyllique et renforce la sensation de découverte.
cadrages.justification_angle: Accentue la grandeur du moment et la réalisation du rêve de Mickael.

cadrages.justification_plan: Met en valeur le paysage spectaculaire du coucher de soleil, soulignant la sérénité du moment.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Permet une contemplation tranquille du coucher de soleil et de l'émotion de Mickael.
cadrages.justification_angle: Permet au spectateur de partager le moment de calme et de connexion avec la nature.

cadrages.justification_plan: Montre l'étendue de l'océan et la richesse de la vie marine, accentuant la liberté ressentie par Mickael.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Accompagne le mouvement de Mickael dans l'eau, créant une sensation de fluidité et de liberté.
cadrages.justification_angle: Permet au spectateur de vivre l'expérience immersive de la plongée avec Mickael.

cadrages.justification_plan: Capture l'instant de détente de Mickael tout en intégrant l'environnement paisible de la villa.
cadrages.justification_mouvement: Stabilité qui reflète la paix et le contentement de Mickael dans cet instant de relaxation.
cadrages.justification_angle: Permet au spectateur de partager le sentiment de paix et de satisfaction de Mickael.

scenes.justification: Scène d'ouverture, immersion nécessaire pour montrer la décision de Mickael de réserver le voyage.
Transition rapide pour établir l'arrivée de Mickael aux Maldives et son émerveillement initial.
Montrer la sérénité de Mickael en regardant le coucher de soleil, une scène contemplative.
Scène dynamique de snorkeling, capturant la joie et le sens de liberté de Mickael.
Scène finale pour souligner la paix et la satisfaction de Mickael, clôturant l'expérience.

prompts_video.prompt: Put Mickael in his cozy apartment living room during the afternoon. This person is sitting at a wooden desk, wearing a light blue t-shirt and grey sweatpants, with reading glasses perched on his nose. The room is softly lit with natural light filtering through the window. Mickael is scrolling through travel websites on his laptop, his expression thoughtful and hesitant. The camera captures a medium shot, focusing on Mickael's face and the laptop screen. As he clicks 'book' for an overwater villa in the Maldives, he leans back in his chair with a satisfied smile, nodding to himself with a sense of accomplishment. The scene transitions with a slow zoom out, emphasizing the shift from hesitation to excitement.

Transition to Mickael arriving at the Maldives in the morning. The scene opens with a wide shot of a wooden deck of an overwater villa, surrounded by the turquoise ocean. Mickael, wearing a white linen shirt, beige shorts, sandals, sunglasses, and a straw hat, steps off a boat holding a small travel bag. His eyes are wide with anticipation as he looks around. The camera follows him with a slow travelling forward as he walks onto the deck, capturing his awe as he takes a deep breath, standing still and facing the ocean. The scene captures the moment with a medium shot, highlighting Mickael's expression of wonder.

Put Mickael on the deck of the overwater villa during the evening, overlooking the ocean. He is wearing the same white linen shirt and beige shorts, with sandals and a straw hat. The scene opens with a medium shot of Mickael standing with his hands resting on the deck railing, watching the sunset with a serene smile. The camera slowly pans to reveal the vibrant colors of the sunset. Mickael then sits on a deck chair, leaning back and feeling the gentle breeze. The camera captures this transition with a slow zoom in, focusing on his calm demeanor and the peaceful ocean view.

Move to Mickael snorkeling in the clear waters near the villa at midday. The scene opens with a wide shot of Mickael floating in the water, wearing swim trunks and a snorkeling mask. The vibrant colors of the coral reefs and fish surround him. The camera captures his calm expression as he adjusts his mask, then transitions to a medium shot as he swims among the coral reefs, laughing underwater. The scene captures his joy with a slow travelling lateral, showing Mickael reaching out to touch the water playfully, surrounded by the beauty of the underwater world.

Finally, put Mickael relaxing on a hammock on the deck of the overwater villa in the afternoon. He is wearing a white linen shirt and beige shorts, with sunglasses and a straw hat. The scene opens with a medium close-up of Mickael lying in the hammock, sipping a tropical drink and looking up at the sky with a smile. The camera captures his joy and peace with a slow zoom out, showing the serene surroundings. Mickael then closes his eyes, resting his hands on his stomach, embracing the moment with a content expression. The scene concludes with a gentle panoramic view of the villa and ocean.

prompt_bande_son: Create a soothing and ambient soundtrack that complements the serene and luxurious atmosphere of an overwater villa in the Maldives. Incorporate gentle ocean waves, soft tropical bird calls, and a light, melodic tune that evokes relaxation and tranquility. The music should enhance the feeling of peace and awe, matching the visual journey of Mickael's dream vacation.

metadata.dream: I dream of being in an overwater villa in the Maldives
